title: ⚡ The Power Tools Update!
message: We just supercharged your PDF experience! You now have a complete suite of professional PDF utilities right in your pocket—100% free and offline.
points: 🗜️ Smart Compress: Shrink PDF file sizes accurately without losing quality.
✂️ Split & Extract: Pull specific pages out of massive documents instantly.
🖼️ PDF to Images & Images to PDF: Convert between photos and documents seamlessly.
📑 Advanced Merge: Visually reorder and combine multiple PDFs using our new 3D grid.
🔒 Secure Offline Processing: All tools run directly on your device. Zero cloud uploads, total privacy.
